title: Como bola sin manija
overview: Rubén is 77 years old, lives in Bernal and for almost three decades he has refused to leave his house, even though there is no apparent reason to justify it. His three nephews, very different from each other, try to reveal the cause of the confinement. But Manija, Rubén's former friend (an affable hermit), hides a grudge and perhaps the key to the mystery. real tragicomedy.
